name: RALPH LAUREN CORP
business: RALPH LAUREN CORP designs, markets, and distributes luxury lifestyle products including apparel, handbags, footwear & accessories, fragrances, home, and hospitality. It sells directly to consumers through retail stores, concession-based shop-within-shops, and digital commerce, and to wholesale customers including department stores, specialty stores, and third-party digital partners. It also licenses its trademarks to third parties for specified products and geographies.
sellsTo: consumers (directly via retail stores, concessions, digital commerce)

exposures.sentence: We are a global leader in the design, marketing, and distribution of luxury lifestyle products, including apparel, handbags, footwear & accessories, fragrances, home, and hospitality.
We sell directly to consumers through our integrated retail channel, which includes our retail stores, concession-based shop-within-shops, and digital commerce operations around the world.
We continue to enhance our solutions for advanced analytics, furthering our use of AI, both predictive and generative, and machine learning for areas such as planning, marketing, and personalization.

During Fiscal 2026, we continued to advance key workstreams under the NGT project including completion of global design templates that support our core enterprise resource planning platform and related processes, automating certain distribution center operations, and progressing the global roll-out of merchandise allocation and long-range demand planning tools.

catalysts.event: Increase in quarterly cash dividend from $0.9125 to $1.00 per share
catalysts.sentence: On May 14, 2026, our Board of Directors approved an additional increase to the quarterly cash dividend on our common stock from $0.9125 to $1.00 per share. The first quarterly dividend to reflect this increase is expected to be payable to shareholders of record at close of business on June 26, 2026 and paid on July 10, 2026.

catalysts.event: Release of Fiscal 2026 Global Citizenship & Sustainability Report
catalysts.sentence: Our Global Citizenship & Sustainability Report covering Fiscal 2026 is expected to be released in September 2026.

catalysts.event: Dressing Team USA for 2028 Summer Olympic and Paralympic Games
catalysts.sentence: we will be dressing the team for the upcoming 2028 Summer Olympic and Paralympic Games in Los Angeles.
